name: Hiromichi Sakamoto
description:
'''Hiromichi Sakamoto''' (born 1962) is a Japanese [[Avant-garde music|avant-garde]] composer and [[Cello|cellist]] in the [[Japanoise]] and [[jazz]] art scene. Along with the cello, he uses voices and [[Musical saw|musical saws]] in his work. He is also known for playing the cello with various objects, like drill machines, grinding machines, and adult vibrators.

He has collaborated with musicians including [[Haco]], [[Catherine Jauniaux]], [[Lars Hollmer]], and [[Level & Tyson]].

Hiromichi was featured in the 2009 documentary ''We Don't Care About Music Anyway''.
